name: io.github.helbertparanhos/postforme-mcp-pro
description: Publish, schedule and analyze social posts across 9 platforms via the Post for Me API.
title: Post for Me MCP Pro

environmentVariables.name: POSTFORME_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Post for Me API key (Dashboard - Settings - API Keys).

environmentVariables.name: POSTFORME_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to block all write tools.
